all.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · MSP Operations · IT Support & Automation
introParagraphs: Full-Stack Developer with {experience} of hands-on experience across MSP IT operations, technical support, and custom web application development. Currently working at Fast & Reliable IT Services, supporting managed environments through ticket handling, user support, Microsoft 365 administration, endpoint security tooling, and day-to-day IT operations while also contributing to internal software projects.

Independently developed and deployed a custom construction job management platform (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL), handling the full development lifecycle: client communication, requirements gathering, frontend/backend implementation, Linux server management, and third-party integrations.

Comfortable across technical support and software engineering environments, with experience in automation, cloud administration, Active Directory, endpoint security platforms, and AI-assisted development workflows. Known for adapting quickly, communicating clearly with clients, and taking ownership of problems through to resolution.

Full-Stack.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · React · Node.js · PostgreSQL · AI Integration
introParagraphs: Full-Stack Developer with {experience} of experience building production applications end-to-end, from client requirements through frontend/backend implementation, Linux server deployment, and third-party integrations. Independently developed and deployed a custom construction job management platform (React, Node.js/Express, PostgreSQL) from scratch, replacing a company’s paid workflow tool.

Experienced with React, Node.js/Express, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, JWT authentication, QuickBooks API integration, PDF generation workflows, and AI-assisted development. Built and shipped AI interviewer platforms (LLM + STT + TTS) using OpenAI and Ollama, with pluggable service architectures and cross-platform startup tooling.

Background in MSP operations provides strong operational context, with hands-on experience managing Linux VPS deployments, SSH access, firewall configuration, automated backups, and production troubleshooting alongside the development work.

IT.subtitle: IT Support Specialist · MSP Operations · Microsoft 365 · Endpoint Security
introParagraphs: IT Support Technician with hands-on experience in a fast-paced MSP environment, supporting managed clients across Microsoft 365 administration, Active Directory, endpoint security platforms, and Windows/networking troubleshooting.

Proficient in the Kaseya ecosystem (Datto RMM, Datto EDR, ThreatLocker, Duo, Graphus, Inky, Autotask), phishing/security investigations, Exchange Online, SharePoint, user onboarding/offboarding, MFA, and access management. Comfortable handling high-volume ticket queues across multiple client environments.

Software development background enables automation of internal workflows, including custom reporting utilities for investigating abnormal OneDrive synchronization and SharePoint recycle-bin activity, and other internal tooling used in production MSP workflows.

NOC.subtitle: NOC Engineer · Network Monitoring · CCNA · Infrastructure Support
introParagraphs: NOC Technician with hands-on experience in network operations and IT infrastructure, combining practical MSP support work with deep Cisco CCNA-level networking knowledge. Currently supporting managed client environments with network monitoring, connectivity troubleshooting, and incident response at Fast & Reliable IT Services.

Strong foundation in Cisco CCNA concepts including OSI Model, TCP/IP Stack, IPv4/IPv6, subnetting, VLANs, routing (OSPF, EIGRP, RIP), NAT, ACLs, WAN, wireless, and security. Completed extensive Cisco Packet Tracer labs covering router/switch configuration, troubleshooting, VLANs, routing protocols, DHCP, HSRP, STP, and EtherChannel.

Familiar with network monitoring concepts including SNMP, Syslog, and monitoring platform workflows through CCNA study. Knowledgeable in LAN/WAN configuration (VPN, MPLS), firewall and security concepts (ACLs, port security, DHCP snooping, IDS/IPS), device management (Cisco IOS, SSH, AAA), QoS, and network automation concepts (APIs, Ansible, SDN).

Customer-Support.subtitle: Customer Support Specialist · Technical & Product Support · Client Communication
introParagraphs: Customer Support Specialist with {experience} of experience delivering technical and product support across fast-paced remote environments, handling 30–50 client requests per day at peak volume.

Experienced with supporting users through annotated screenshots, screen recordings, and step-by-step guides. Comfortable communicating with non-English-speaking clients, and proficient with Crisp, Slack, and email-based support workflows. Skilled at translating technical solutions into clear, accessible instructions.

Client-facing background extends to business development and account management at PanaceaLogics, conducting client meetings, gathering project requirements, managing client relationships via Odoo, and handling follow-ups across Upwork and Freelancer projects.

Business-Dev.subtitle: Business Development Specialist · Client Acquisition · Upwork · Proposal Writing
introParagraphs: Business Development Specialist with {experience} of experience in client acquisition, proposal writing, and account management on Upwork and Freelancer. Developed and optimized bidding workflows with automation, improving platform efficiency and client conversion rates at PanaceaLogics.

Experienced in using Odoo for client management: scheduling calls, conducting requirements meetings, and handling project follow-ups. Applied prompt engineering to train AI models for automated proposal writing and job description classification, streamlining the BD pipeline.

Comfortable identifying high-value opportunities using platform-specific strategies (connect optimization, profile boosting, hiring trend analysis) and navigating NDA/IP agreements. Built supporting tools including WhatsApp bulk messaging automation and Excel-based tracking systems for bids and ongoing projects.
